transcript.speaker: actor
transcript.message: Hi, thanks for your message. Are you working at the moment and when would you be looking to move?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.message: I’m a Product Manager, and my partner Sophie works in marketing. We’re looking to move next month. When would be a good time to come see the flat?

transcript.speaker: actor
transcript.message: Thanks. I still need to know your work situation and move date before sharing contact details.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.message: I’m currently working full-time as a Product Manager, and Sophie is in marketing. We’re aiming to move in early May. When could we arrange a viewing?

transcript.speaker: actor
transcript.message: How about Saturday at 2pm?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.message: Saturday at 2pm works for us. Could you please share your number so we can coordinate on the day?

transcript.speaker: actor
transcript.message: Yes, that works for me. You can call me on 07123456789 this evening to arrange the viewing.
